sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32056" key="e)kqumi/asis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκθῡμί-ασις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n32056.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">evaporation, expansion,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">θερμοῦ</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0667.tlg001:59" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Marcellin.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Puls.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">59</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
